subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down in truth unto a people who recognize that verily there is no God but Him, and that all shall return unto Him. We have ordained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل بالحق لقوم یعرفون انه ما من اله الا هو و کل الیه راجعون قد قدرنا
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prophecy and fulfillment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
